seoTitle: Duri vs Duroby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Duri and Duroby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Duri and Duroby.
heading: Duri vs Duroby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Duri, New South Wales and Duroby, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Duroby has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Duri (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Duri or Duroby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Duri has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Duroby scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Duri scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Duroby scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Duri or Duroby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Duroby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
